## Project submission checklist

- [ ] I added a new markdown file under `_projects/`
- [ ] I used the required front matter fields
- [ ] `team` is a YAML list
- [ ] I removed or changed the template `published: false` line
- [ ] `poster_image` points to `assets/images/projects/<semester-slug>/...`
- [ ] `repo_url` and `demo_url` are correct
- [ ] The project appears under the correct semester
- [ ] I ran a local build with `bundle exec jekyll build`
